arts.ttl: Chelsea lose but into Conference League SF
arts.sum: Chelsea secured a spot in the Conference League semifinals despite losing the second leg of their quarterfinal 2-1 at home to Legia Warsaw on Thurday.

arts.ttl: Legia Warsaw supporters let off flares in entirely SHIRTLESS away end during Conference League victory against Chelsea at Stamford Bridge
arts.sum: The Polish club, who have earned a reputation as the bad boys of Europe after several incidents of disorder, were knocked out on aggregate.

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Legia Warsaw player ratings
arts.sum: Chelsea progressed to the semi-finals of the Conference League despite a poor performance in a second-leg defeat at Stamford Bridge. Here’s how we rated each Blues player in the 2-1 loss to Legia Warsaw. arts.ttl: Chelsea (4) 1-2 (2) Legia Warsaw: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Blues book semi-final spot
arts.sum: Chelsea secure their Conference League semi-final place with a 4-2 aggregate victory over Legia Warsaw in the quarter-final, despite a 2-1 defeat on the night.

arts.ttl: Chelsea progress but fail to impress as Legia Warsaw win on the night
arts.sum: The Blues were beaten 2-1 at Stamford Bridge but reached the last four of the Conference League with a 4-2 aggregate victory.
